title: High Tide
writer: Robert Presnell Sr., Raoul Whitfield, Peter Milne
actors: Lee Tracy, Don Castle, Julie Bishop
plot: A fast-moving automobile fails to make a sharp turn of the highway from Malibu to Los Angeles. It overturns and its occupants, Tim Slade, Newspaper man turned private investigator, and Hugh Fresney, managing editor of the Los Ange...
